name: 10th Lord Mahadasha — Career Rise
description: The primary planetary period for achieving professional recognition, authority, government honors, and major career ascension.

source_text.quote: recognition from and awards by Government in the Dasa of the lord of the 10th

all_of: The Mahadasha of the 10th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The primary planetary period for achieving professional recognition, authority, government honors, and major career ascension is during the Mahadasha of the 10th house lord.

metadata.notes: Fundamental baseline rule for career timing in Vimshottari Dasha.

name: 1st-10th Lord Parivartana — High Position
description: A powerful mutual exchange between self (1st) and career/karma (10th) triggers major professional ascension.

source_text.quote: There will be acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of a high position in Government) in the Dasha of the lords of the Ascendant and 10th, if the lord of the 10th be in the Ascendant and the lord of the Ascendant be in the 10th.

all_of: The 1st Lord is positioned in the 10th house
The 10th Lord is positioned in the 1st house
any_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 1st Lord is active
The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 10th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: A powerful Parivartana Yoga (mutual exchange) between the self (1st) and career/karma (10th) triggers major professional ascension and executive power during the planetary periods of either involved lord.

metadata.notes: Classic combination for achieving high public office or leadership roles.

name: Dharma-Karma Rajayoga — 9th/10th/5th Lords
description: Activation of Rajayogas formed by lords of fortune, karma, and intelligence creates a broad window for career success.

source_text.quote: If the lord of the 9th and 10th be in conjunction with the lord of the 5th, their Dasha produce beneficial results. [...] The Dasha of the lords of the 10th and 4th produce favourable effects if they be associated with the lord of the 9th.

any_of: The 9th Lord, 10th Lord, and 5th Lord are conjunct, and the Dasha of any of these lords is active
The 10th Lord, 4th Lord, and 9th Lord are conjunct, and the Dasha of any of these lords is active

interpretation.meaning: Activation of Dharma-Karma Adhipati Yoga during their planetary periods creates a broad window for significant career success, promotions, and overall beneficial professional results.

metadata.notes: Links the houses of fortune and intelligence directly to professional outcomes.

name: Saturn-Saturn Period — Executive Authority
description: A structurally strong Saturn brings immense professional elevation during its own MD-AD combination.

source_text.quote: Effects like acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of a high position in government)... attainment of the position of a commander of the army... will be derived in the Antardasa of Saturn in the Dasa of Saturn, if Saturn be in his own sign, in his sign of exaltation or in deep exaltation, or be in Kendra or Trikona from the Ascendant, or be a yoga-karaka.

any_of: Saturn is in its own sign (Capricorn, Aquarius)
Saturn is a Yogakaraka for the Ascendant (e.g., Taurus, Libra)

interpretation.meaning: A structurally strong Saturn, the natural significator of career and karma, brings immense professional elevation during its own Mahadasha and Antardasha.

metadata.notes: Requires Saturn to be functionally and positionally strong to bestow these high-level career effects rather than delays.

name: Saturn-Venus Period — Career Honors and Wealth
description: One of the most celebrated periods for exceptional career rise, material wealth, and professional honors.

source_text.quote: acquisition of a kingdom (attainment of high position in government), enjoyments by the beneficence of the king (government), honours... will be derived in the Antardasa of Venus in the Dasa of Saturn; if Venus be in Kendra, Trikona or the 11th associated with or aspected by benefices.

none_of: Venus is devoid of benefic associations or aspects

interpretation.meaning: The highly celebrated Saturn-Venus period reliably brings exceptional career rise, material wealth, and professional honors, provided Venus is well-placed.

metadata.notes: One of the most famous mutual dasha periods for wealth and career elevation in Vedic astrology.

name: Sun-Mercury Period — High Administrative Position
description: The Sun (authority) combined with Mercury (intellect/administration) leads to high administrative positions.

source_text.quote: Sun-Mercury-Feeding from the king's kitchen, acquisition of Chhatra and Chamar with royal symbols, attainment of the position of a high dignitary of government.

interpretation.meaning: The combination of the Sun (signifying authority and government) and Mercury (signifying intellect and administration) periods leads to high administrative positions, advisory roles, and executive power.

metadata.notes: A general indication for government service, consulting, or elevation to executive status.

name: Sun-Jupiter Period — Government Recognition
description: Overlapping periods of the two primary planets of dharma and authority generate strong public recognition.

source_text.quote: Sun-Jupiter-Recognition by government, respected by government employees, becoming favourite of the king.

interpretation.meaning: The overlapping periods of the two primary planets of dharma and authority (Sun and Jupiter) generate strong public recognition, favors from higher-ups, and an expansion of professional reputation.

metadata.notes: Excellent for seeking promotions, government contracts, or expanding public influence.

name: Mercury-Jupiter Period — Business Profits
description: The period ruled by commerce (Mercury) combined with expansion/wealth (Jupiter) triggers lucrative business opportunities.

source_text.quote: Mercury-Jupiter-Sublimity, progress in education, increase in wealth and good qualities, profits in business.

interpretation.meaning: The period ruled by the planet of commerce (Mercury) combined with the planet of expansion and wealth (Jupiter) specifically triggers lucrative business opportunities and commercial profitability.

metadata.notes: A key window for entrepreneurs and those in trade/commerce.
